title: Just a Backpack
description: Just adds a dyeable backpack without gimmicks.
body:
# Just a Backpack

[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Supports Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)

Just adds a dyeable backpack without gimmicks.

Open it by right-clicking or by pressing the Open Backpack keybind (default: B) to reveal 27 slots to keep your items in.

Please note that this mod makes Shulker Boxes mostly obsolete.

## Crafting Recipe

![The Backpack crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4LWc2Mjr/images/62a443cb26c0ef455e85b2a14f705a19e25e357f.png)
